text: Why did Patrick keep on asking the same question?
zh: 为什么帕特里克老是问同一个问题?

text: The former Prime Minister, Mr. Wentworth Lane, was defeated in the recent elections.
zh: 前首相温特沃斯·莱恩先生在最近的选举中落败了。

text: He is now retiring from political life and has gone abroad.
zh: 他现在已经退出政坛,出国去了。

text: My friend, Patrick, has always been a fanatical opponent of Mr. Lane's Radical Progressive Party.
zh: 我的朋友帕特里克一直都是莱恩先生所在的激进进步党的死对头。

text: After the elections, Patrick went to the former Prime Minister's house.
zh: 选举结束后,帕特里克去了前首相的家。

text: When he asked if Mr. Lane lived there, the policeman on duty told him that since his defeat, the ex-Prime Minister had gone abroad.
zh: 他询问莱恩先生是否住在那里时,值勤的警察告诉他,前首相落选后已经出国了。

text: On the following day Patrick went to the house again.
zh: 第二天,帕特里克又去了那栋房子。

text: The same policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance, when Patrick asked the same question.
zh: 当同一位警察正慢慢走过门口时,帕特里克又问了同样的问题。

text: Though a little suspicious this time the policeman gave him the same answer.
zh: 这次警察虽然有点起疑,但还是给了他同样的答复。

text: The day after, Patrick went to the house once more and asked exactly the same question.
zh: 又过了一天,帕特里克再次来到那栋房子,问了一模一样的问题。

text: This time, the policeman lost his temper.
zh: 这一次,警察终于发火了。

text: 'I told you yesterday and the day before yesterday,' he shouted,
zh: “我昨天和前天都告诉过你了,”他喊道,

text: He has retired from political life and gone to live abroad!'
zh: 他已经退出政坛,搬到国外去住了!”

text: 'I know,' answered Patrick,' but I love to hear you say it!'
zh: “我知道,”帕特里克答道,“可我就是喜欢听你说这句话!”
